title: FindingSourceList
description: FindingSourceList schema from AWS IAM Access Analyzer API

allOf.description: Indicates the type of access that generated the finding.
Includes details about how the access that generated the finding is granted. This is populated for Amazon S3 bucket findings.

items.description: The source of the finding. This indicates how the access that generated the finding is granted. It is populated for Amazon S3 bucket findings.
